rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amended Petition And Objections To Trustees Accountings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: The Motion for Leave to File Amended Petition and Objections to Trustee's Accountings filed by Christine Bennett and Paricia Gridley is GRANTED. Michael A. Gridley filed a Statement of Non-Opposition to the Motion and no other opposition has been received by the Court. The Amended Petition and Objections must be filed no later than July 18, 2012. Any response must be filed no later than July 25, 2012. Any party wishing to contest the tentative must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on July 11, 2012. 7/11/12 Addendum to Tentative: The trial date in this matter having been continued to 10/25-26/12 the Amended Petition and Objections must be filed no later than 8/20/12 and any response must be filed no later than 9/20/12.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOSIE FISHER 2008 LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer Of E. Stevenson To Petition For Order Determing Trust Instrument Invalid By F. Jackson.
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer to the Petition for Order Determining Trust Instrument Invalid is off calendar as moot in light of the dismissal of that petition filed by petitioner on June 20, 2012. Any party wishing to argue the motion or tentative ruling must contact opposing counsel and the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, July 11, 2012.
